description.value:
A heavy-headed mallet used by craftsmen and soldiers alike. Its flat face can drive spikes or crack skulls, and it flies surprisingly well when hurled with purpose.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d4, Bludgeoning
BasicOne-Handed, Light, Melee d4, Thrown (20/60), Bludgeoning, Disarm
MasterOne-Handed, Light, Melee d4, Thrown (20/60), Bludgeoning, Disarm, bonus shove
Master PerkWhen you take the Attack action with this weapon, you may use your bonus action to attempt a shove. On a successful shove, the target also takes weapon damage.

rmeData.masterPerk: When you take the Attack action, you may use your bonus action to shove a target. On a successful shove, the target also takes weapon damage.
